title: AUAUY Charm Bracelet Making Kit - 66pcs Gifts for Girls & Boys, Arts & Crafts for Kids Age 5-10
features: 【CHARM BRACELET MAKING KIT】Bracelet jewelry set contains 1 jewelry box, 20 silver-plated metal pendant beads, 20 pendant beads, 20 colorful crystal beads, 3 adjustable silver-plated snake chain bracelets, 3 adjustable silver-plated snake chain necklaces and 1 instruction manual. Little girls can make amazing custom bracelets in a short time

【WELL MADE AND EASY TO INSTALL】The children's girls bracelets are made of high-quality metal, sturdy and shiny. The alloy beads are silver-plated and not easy to fade. The process of making children's jewelry is very simple, unscrew the chain cover, add your favorite beads and pendants, and you can make stringless bracelets and necklaces. You can mix and match to create your own bracelets

【INSPIRE CHILDREN'S UNIQUE CREATIONS】This girls jewelry making kit is a great children's jewelry set for girls to make necklaces and bracelets. Children can create bracelets with different themes through different beads. This set can also inspire girls to develop creative hobbies and self-expression skills, and can also cultivate children's creativity and hands-on ability

【PARTY ART AND CRAFT ACTIVITY】This is a fun DIY party craft for girls. Little girls can make amazing customized bracelets in a short time, and girls can make their own personalized bracelets together and share them with friends. AUAUY jewelry making kit meets all the needs of girls

【AGED 3-12 GIRLS BIRTHDAY PRESENTS】This girls jewelry making kit is a creative gift for 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12 and 13 years old girls, or as a toy for girls, perfect for stocking stuffers, Christmas gifts, Valentine's Day gifts, birthday gifts and New Year gifts. Kids can give DIY bracelets as gifts to friends. Most girls will find it hard to resist such a pretty gift
